meta.title: Foreign qualification into NY — document CoGS by origin jurisdiction
meta.scope: Home-state standing + certified formation copy fees; plus fixed NY filing fees. Publication and assumed-name excluded from floors.
meta.pricing_rule: When setting a list price for a home state, charge one flat fee for foreign PLLC and foreign PC equal to max(path costs). Quote unusual certified-copy page counts, NYSED per-member fees, publication, and assumed names separately.
assumptions: Per-page certified-copy estimates typically assume ~2 pages unless agent noted otherwise.
Online/standard processing preferred when fee schedules differ.
indicative_gov_cogs_floor_usd = unified_doc_cogs_usd + max(NY single-member PLLC filing CoGS, NY PC filing CoGS). Does not include labor, publication, or margin.

list_price_formula.notes: PC-path base ($895) + home-state unified docs (max of PLLC/PC paths). Live site prices for offered states remain in current_list_price_usd when they differ.

foreign_pllc_usd.notes: Initial Certificate of Authority (Application of Authority consent) before DOS filing; $50 + $10 per member/manager; payable to New York State Education Department.

foreign_pc_usd.notes: Initial Certificate of Authority (Application of Authority consent) before DOS filing; flat $50; payable to New York State Education Department.

dos_application_for_authority.notes: Application for Authority — Professional Service (foreign PLLC under LLC Law §1306; foreign PC under BCL §1530); payable to Department of State.

publication.notes: Required for foreign PLLCs only (LLC Law §1306(d)); $50 DOS Certificate of Publication filing fee plus county-variable newspaper costs. Foreign PCs have no publication requirement.

typical_fixed_ny_filing_cogs_usd.notes: PLLC: NYSED $60 ($50 + $10) + DOS $200 + DOS certified copy $10. PC: NYSED $50 + DOS $200 + DOS certified copy $10 + NYSED certified-copy filing $20. Excludes publication, assumed name, and home-state documents.

llc.name: Certificate of Compliance
llc.notes: AK equivalent of Certificate of Good Standing; online or mail.

corp.name: Certificate of Compliance
corp.notes: AK equivalent of Certificate of Good Standing; online or mail.

llc.notes: $10 per specified multi-page document plus $5 certification fee (AAC 3.16.080). Typical single formation document ≈ $15.

corp.notes: $10 per specified multi-page document plus $5 certification fee (AAC 3.16.080). Typical single formation document ≈ $15.

llc.name: Certificate of Existence
llc.notes: Statute: $25 (<24 hr), $10 (24 hr+). SOS application form lists $25 standard mail processing; online immediate $27.75.

corp.name: Certificate of Existence
corp.notes: Same fee for all entity types per Ala. Code § 10A-1-4.31(7).

llc.notes: $5 certification plus $1.50/page copying per Ala. Code § 10A-1-4.31(g).

corp.notes: $5 certification plus $1.50/page copying per Ala. Code § 10A-1-4.31(g).

corp.name: Certificate of Good Standing

corp.notes: $5 certification fee plus $0.50/page copy fee.
